title: How Naming It to God Kills What You've Been Managing
caption:
You've been calling it a struggle for years. Scripture calls it something else.

Romans 8:13 doesn't say manage the flesh. It says put it to death, and you'll live. That's not balance, not moderation. Death.

Managing it means it's still alive next year, still costing you the same three hours, still the thing you're praying around instead of through. Killing it starts smaller than that: naming it out loud tonight, telling one man the real version, praying for it to die instead of just quiet down.

"For if you live according to the flesh you will die, but if by the Spirit you put to death the deeds of the body, you will live." — Romans 8:13

The fence goes up after. But the kill has to happen first.

Save this before the next time you catch yourself managing it again.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #romans #scripture #christianity
